main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'Propylene glycol residual... fouling' menciona PG pero 'fouling' es impreciso

key_signals.justification: C2: 6 signals listed (caudal, cond, dP1, dP2, P, rechazo)

alternatives.justification: C3: 2 alts pero el primero 'incomplete wetting' descarta erroneamente con argumento debil

recommended_action.justification: C4: 20% pressure 24h ok pero sugiere 'low-pH flush pH 2-3' (CIP) - recoverable fail

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: generica 'if conductivity remains elevated... reconsider'

automatic_fails_triggered.reference: Aplicar CIP ácido o alcalino antes de completar el wetting
automatic_fails_triggered.justification: Propone low-pH flush pH 2-3 antes de completar wetting
